serendipity: The occurrence of events by chance in a happy or beneficial way.
ephemeral: Lasting for a very short time.
quintessential: Representing the most perfect or typical example of a quality or class.
ameliorate: To make something better; to improve.
aberration: A departure from what is normal, usual, or expected.
tenacious: Tending to keep a firm hold of something; persistent.
pragmatic: Dealing with things sensibly and realistically based on practical considerations.
